title: sparho: nonsmooth bilevel hyperparameter optimization via implicit differentiation
description: Python + Rust library for hyperparameter optimization of non-smooth sparse-regression estimators (Lasso, ElasticNet, weighted Lasso, group Lasso, sparse logistic regression) via implicit differentiation. Maintained, performant successor to sparse-ho (Bertrand et al., ICML 2020). Computes hypergradients by solving a restricted KKT linear system on the active set; outer loop via HOAG (Pedregosa, 2016) or gradient descent. Rust kernels via PyO3 + maturin ABI3, numpy/scipy-stack-native, no densification of sparse designs.
